历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 12519 → 15615 → 17273 → 15454 → 16970, showing an overall backward trend. The 2025 baseline is about 16970. Fluctuations have been significant in the past five years, peaking at 17273 in 2023, dropping to 15454 in 2024, and rising again to 16970 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 79 in 2021, 80 in 2022, 78 in 2023, 80 in 2024, and 80 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 80, unchanged from 2025, with no signal of expansion or contraction at the plan level.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 84th, with recent rankings stable in the 75–84 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions. The school has no obvious negative or positive public opinion incidents in its reputation file. Its Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106, indicating average attention. There are no records of enrollment gaps in the abnormal enrollment file, so the application psychology is relatively stable. The Electrical Engineering discipline is rated A, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-, both core disciplines in the power industry, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major is highly recommended with high social popularity. Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and similar majors remain consistently popular. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is approximately 160,400 (estimated based on historical proportions), an increase of about 11.9% from 143,400 in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, adjacent to Liaoning Province, with moderate regional preference. university_e.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in provincial Physics Category examinees (approximately +11.9%), and the sustained high popularity of flagship majors like Electrical Engineering, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 16970, with rankings continuing to move backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17350, with a range of 17000–18000.
